title: Chibli Resourcepack
description: Introducing the Chibli Resourcepack! The name "Chibli" is a playful blend of "Chibi," meaning small in Japanese, and "Ghibli," a nod to the renowned anime studio. This new pack embraces an anime/cartoon theme aesthetic.
body:
You can find 128x-512x versions here

Join Us On Discord 25,000+ members here

Introducing the Chibli Resourcepack! The name "Chibli" is a playful blend of "Chibi," meaning small in Japanese, and "Ghibli," a nod to the renowned anime studio. This new pack embraces an anime/cartoon theme aesthetic, creating a vibrant and whimsical experience. What sets Chibli apart is its immersive and surreal 3D effects, adding depth and dimension to your gameplay like never before. Whether you're exploring new worlds or building your dream structures, Chibli is designed to bring a fresh, animated charm to your Minecraft adventures. READ THROUGH COMPLETELY (IMPORTANT) Note : Must Install. Either Sodium/ Iris or Optifine before running the pack Settings : Set render distance / Chunks at less than 12 for More fps ____________________________________________________________________________________________________ Download KAPPA SHADER (Recommended Shader) [Shader Settings](https://imgur.com/a/mT433Zm)
